PreToolUse.command: powershell -NoProfile -Command "$input = [Console]::In.ReadToEnd() | ConvertFrom-Json; $toolName = $input.toolName; $filePath = $input.toolInput.file_path; if ($toolName -in @('edit','create') -and $filePath -like '*.rs') { $newContent = $input.toolInput.new_str; if ($newContent -and ($newContent -match '\.unwrap\(\)' -or $newContent -match '\.expect\(')) { Write-Error '🚨 ANAYASA İHLALİ: unwrap() ve expect() kullanımı yasaktır! Alternatifler: result?, .ok_or()?, .unwrap_or_default()'; exit 2 } }"
